rules.trigger: Any bug causing unauthorized orders, wrong side, wrong size, or bypass of risk caps.
rules.automatic_response: Immediate trading halt via kill switch; cancel open orders where safe; snapshot logs.
rules.resume_conditions: Root cause in written RCA; patched release or config; replay test on staging; explicit human unhalt.

rules.trigger: Two execution errors in rolling 24h without attributable venue outage.
rules.automatic_response: Pause new entries; allow risk-reducing exits only; tag system health score danger.
rules.resume_conditions: Both errors explained or reproduced as benign with proof; regression test added.

rules.trigger: Three duplicate-intent or double-submit events in rolling 7d (venue or internal).
rules.automatic_response: Halt live entries; run duplicate-path audit; tighten idempotency keys.
rules.resume_conditions: Zero dupes in 48h dry-run + 24h supervised micro live.

rules.trigger: Realized+unrealized day loss exceeds configured daily loss cap % of equity.
rules.automatic_response: Stop new risk; flatten per risk policy; cooldown until next UTC day or manual reset per policy.
rules.resume_conditions: UTC day rollover AND health green OR human override with written rationale.

rules.trigger: Rolling median slippage bps > danger threshold in live_dashboard_thresholds for N trades.
rules.automatic_response: Reduce size to previous step; widen only after measurement fix; pause aggressive deployment gate.
rules.resume_conditions: Slippage back to caution band for min 15 closed trades AND cause classified.

rules.trigger: Internal expected fill vs venue reported fill beyond tolerance on any closed trade.
rules.automatic_response: Halt entries; reconcile ledger vs venue; freeze scaling gates.
rules.resume_conditions: Mismatches explained and corrected in reconciliation tool or feed.

rules.trigger: Post-fee expectancy drops below zero for min_sample trades since last good window AND profit_factor < 1.
rules.automatic_response: Force state NOT_READY_REDUCE_RISK; cut size 50%; suppress worst setup types automatically if wired.
rules.resume_conditions: Expectancy back above gate with stable CI OR strategy revision approved.

rules.trigger: Rolling profit_factor falls below 1.0 for >=30 trades OR max_dd exceeds weekly budget.
rules.automatic_response: Rollback last scaling step; freeze search pressure widening.
rules.resume_conditions: Two consecutive weeks in caution-or-better on dashboard with same policy version.

rules.trigger: JSON/JSONL parse failures, checksum mismatch, or missing append-only continuity on trade_events.
rules.automatic_response: Halt autonomy writers; switch to read-only ops mode; backup damaged files.
rules.resume_conditions: Repaired chain from venue exports OR restored backup; validator passes.

rules.trigger: orchestration_truth_chain or deployment fingerprint differs from expected for active release.
rules.automatic_response: Block scaling; enqueue validation_queue; snapshot configs.
rules.resume_conditions: Drift explained (deploy vs config) and reconciled to single truth version.

rules.trigger: Conflicting directives from two bots on same scope (capital, gate, or execution intent).
rules.automatic_response: Fail-closed to stricter instruction; log conflict; pause autonomous parameter changes.
rules.resume_conditions: Conflict resolved in bot_permissions_matrix + written precedence rule.

rules.trigger: Unexplained delta between logged signal intent and execution parameters beyond tolerance.
rules.automatic_response: Halt live; trace intent ledger to fills; freeze learning bot auto-writes.
rules.resume_conditions: Trace complete with code/config fix OR proven external venue behavior with acceptance doc.
